entity.summary: Starknet automated market maker and decentralized trading protocol supporting concentrated liquidity, algorithmic vaults, programmable positions, onchain limit orders, swaps, and a public trading interface.
entity.notes: Current first-party documentation identifies Haiko as an audited Starknet AMM live on mainnet and documents concentrated liquidity, strategies, positions, limit orders, and swaps. The current public application exposes trading and liquidity-management surfaces. No exact launch date or legal jurisdiction is asserted.

evidence.title: Haiko documentation
evidence.notes: First-party documentation identifies Haiko as an audited AMM live on Starknet mainnet and documents hooks-based concentrated liquidity, strategies, positions, limit orders, and trading functions.

evidence.title: Haiko live application
evidence.notes: Current first-party application exposes Vaults, Positions, Trade, Activity, and Rewards routes, supporting active protocol and public-interface classification.
